reviews.comment:
Atención por parte de personal de la tienda YPF Full pésima. Con mucho desgano, los baños clausurados, sin respuesta a consultas. Tienen mucho para mejorar en atención al cliente.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the YPF Full store was terrible. They were very unenthusiastic, the restrooms were closed, and they didn't answer any questions. They have a lot of room for improvement in customer service.

reviews.comment:
Hermoso lugar limpio y execelente servicio muy amable los chicos que atienden.
Hoy me tocó ver gente soberbia maltratando al pobre personal por un simple erros somos humanos gente.
Gracias acá Susana ,☺️👍

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful, clean place with excellent service; the staff are very friendly.

Today I witnessed arrogant people mistreating the poor staff for a simple mistake. We're all human.
Thanks to Susana here, ☺️👍
